1057.issue: [E1057] js-controller 5.0.19 listed as dependency but 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please update dependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/dirkhe/ioBroker.webcal/blob/master/io-package.json).

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.4.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3014.issue: [S3014] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3018.issue: [S3018] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is missing required permissions "contents: write" and "id-token: write" at job level. Trusted publishing will not work without them.

3019.issue: [W3019] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

3020.issue: [E3020] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 18 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 18 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3024.issue: [W3024] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix uses node.js 18 which is not in the list of recommended testing versions (20, 22, 24).

3025.issue: [E3025] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix is missing required node.js version 24. Tests with node.js 24 are required.

3032.issue: [W3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v1.4.0" was found for current release 1.4.0. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

4043.issue: [E4043] Incorrect schema URL for jsonConfig files in .vscode/settings.json. Expected: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.admin/master/packages/jsonConfig/schemas/jsonConfig.json", found: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ioBroker/adapter-react-v5/main/schemas/jsonConfig.json"

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (src/lib/eventManager.ts). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5033.issue: [W5033] method "createChannel()" is deprecated and will be removed with future js-controller version. Please use "set/deleteObject()" instead.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "fs" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:fs" instead.

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (src/lib/calDav.ts, src/lib/iCalReadOnly.ts). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

5060.issue: [W5060] Package "ical.js" is listed in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/dirkhe/ioBroker.webcal/blob/master/package.json) but not imported or required by any scanned source file. Dependency might be unused.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_calendars/items/calendars/items[10]" attribute "label" uses key "test" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm", "github-actions") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8911.issue: [S8911] File "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml" was found. Consider migrating to the new standard workflow "automerge-dependabot.yml".

8912.issue: [E8912] Automerge workflow file "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml" uses deprecated action "ahmadnassri/action-dependabot-auto-merge" which no longer works. Please migrate to "iobroker-bot-orga/action-automerge-dependabot@v1".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.
